name: Grilled Perch with Sage
recipeIngredient: 2 12 ounces white perch, gutted and scaled (12 to 15)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Using a sharp knife, make 3-4 slits into the flesh of each perch on both sides.
3. Oil and season the perch with kosher salt and 1 tablespoon olive oil.
4. Stuff 5 sprigs of sage into the cavity of each perch.
5. Place the perch on the grill and cook for 4 minutes, then flip.
6. Place the tomatoes and zucchini on the grill. Cook for another 4 minutes, flipping the vegetables as needed.
7. Transfer the perch to serving plates and drizzle with olive oil.
Yield: 2 servings
